name: io.github.embracingearth-space/ai2fin-tax-mcp
title: AI2Fin (2Fin) Tax MCP
description: Free, no-auth tax tools over MCP: look up GST/VAT, income and company tax rates for 50+ countries; add or remove GST/VAT on an amount; compare countries; and estimate income tax (Australia, New Zealand), company tax (AU, US, UK, Canada, India) and Australian capital gains tax. Every answer cites its source authority. Public rate data only — nothing stored.
